Name: Vanduul Mauler Destroyer
Description:
Manufacturer: Vanduul Clans
Focus: Destroyer

The Mauler is a massive escort craft essential to the Vanduul fleet. This tank of a ship gives its pilots a taste of power, with its multi-level angular design, vast array of weaponry and sharp points on the sides for both aerodynamics and fear-factor.
